name: Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the diced apples, chopped nuts, and diced celery in a large bowl.
2. Add the salt to taste.
3. Drizzle with mayonnaise dressing until the ingredients are evenly moistened.
4. Gently mix the salad using two forks until all components are well combined.
5. Serve on crisp lettuce leaves. Makes 6 servings.
